_graybeard: Every-turn reminder installed by Graybeard /onboard. The `_graybeard` marker lets /onboard (re-run) and /graybeard-uninstall find and remove exactly this hook without touching the user's other hooks. MERGE this object's hooks.UserPromptSubmit entry into the user's existing settings.json — never overwrite the file. If a UserPromptSubmit array already exists, append this entry; if an entry already carries a `_graybeard` marker, replace that one instead of adding a duplicate.

hooks.command: echo "REMINDER (Graybeard laws, every turn): (1) {{USER_NAME}} reviews finished work as {{REVIEW_STYLE}} - never a wall of text; (2) short plain replies, name every assumption out loud, one goal at a time; (3) fix the class not the case - no per-case rules; (4) no 'done/fixed/works' without fresh evidence you ran it - {{USER_NAME}} confirms, never discovers; (5) new idea or feature = graybeard-conductor, small fix = graybeard-worklaw, vague or unfamiliar = graybeard-unknowns; (6) feedback is said once - check the project's feedback notes (PIPELINE.md / implementation-notes.md) before asking anything twice; (7) logs before guesses - read the app's own logs first, autonomy level {{AUTONOMY_LEVEL}}."
